_comment: Species: Meat Jelly (肉冻) from I Shall Seal the Heavens. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Meat Jelly

canonical.appearance: Quivering mass of sentient meat 1 m, can shape into any form, perpetually shimmering
canonical.size: 1 m mass, 200 jin; ancient 5 m, 5000 jin
canonical.behavior: Companion beast; cultivates by absorbing meat-essence; speaks in squeaks
canonical.habitat: Anywhere Meng Hao goes; meat-aspected spirit veins
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: meat_jelly — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
